name: Redis OTel — DEMO
description: DEMO clone for AFA2026 hackathon (EPIC NR-576657). Cluster-aware NRQL facets on redis.cluster.name when present.

pages.name: Redis OTel — DEMO
pages.description: 5 panels: throughput, latency, memory, connections, replication.

rawConfiguration.text:
## DEMO Redis OTel Dashboard

Clone created for **AFA2026 hackathon** (EPIC NR-576657).

Five panels covering the core SRE signals for Redis:

1. Throughput (commands/sec)
2. Latency (network I/O)
3. Memory pressure (used / maxmemory)
4. Connections (active + blocked)
5. Replication lag

Queries automatically facet on `redis.cluster.name` when present, falling back to `server.address` for standalone instances.

See the [OpenTelemetry Redis receiver](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-contrib/tree/main/receiver/redisreceiver) for setup.

nrqlQueries.query: FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(redis.commands.processed), 1 second) AS 'cmd/s' FACET cases(WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AS redis.cluster.name, WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NULL AS server.address) TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT rate(sum(redis.net.input.bytes), 1 second) AS 'in B/s', rate(sum(redis.net.output.bytes), 1 second) AS 'out B/s' FACET cases(WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AS redis.cluster.name, WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NULL AS server.address) TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis.memory.used) / max(redis.maxmemory)) * 100 AS 'mem %' FACET cases(WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AS redis.cluster.name, WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NULL AS server.address) TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT average(redis.clients.connected) AS 'connected', average(redis.clients.blocked) AS 'blocked' FACET cases(WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AS redis.cluster.name, WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NULL AS server.address) TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT max(redis.replication.backlog_first_byte_offset) - max(redis.replication.offset) AS 'lag bytes' FACET cases(WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AS redis.cluster.name, WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NULL AS server.address) TIMESERIES

FROM Metric SELECT (sum(redis.keyspace.misses) / (sum(redis.keyspace.hits) + sum(redis.keyspace.misses))) * 100 AS 'miss %' FACET cases(WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NOT NULL AS redis.cluster.name, WHERE redis.cluster.name IS NULL AS server.address) TIMESERIES
FROM Metric SELECT (max(redis.memory.used) / max(redis.maxmemory)) * 100 AS 'mem %' FACET server.address LIMIT 10
